一款受 Winamp 启发的复古终端音乐播放器

A retro terminal music player inspired by Winamp

github.com 作者 mkagenius 分数 54 评论 8 2026/03/24 04:42
打开 HN 原帖 打开原始文章

中文摘要

  1. ██████ ██ ██ █████ ███ ███ ██████ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ████ ████ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ███████ ██ ████ ██ ██████ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██████ ███████ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██
  2. 受 Winamp 启发的复古终端音乐播放器。使用频谱可视化工具、参数均衡器和播放列表管理来播放本地文件、流媒体、播客、YouTube、SoundCloud、Bilibili、Spotify、小宇宙和 Navidrome。由 Bubbletea、Lip Gloss、Beep 和 go-librespot 制成。
  3. cliamp_whips_tty_ass_compressed.mp4
  4. 收音机 收听我们的广播频道：cliamp https://radio.cliamp.stream/lofi/stream.pls 将您自己的电台添加到 ~/.config/cliamp/radios.toml。请参阅文档/configuration.md。想主持自己的电台吗？查看夹子服务器。安装curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bjarneo/cliamp/HEAD/install.sh | sh Homebrew brew install bjarneo/cliamp/cliamp Arch Linux (AUR) yay -S cliamp 预构建的二进制文件 从 GitHub 版本下载。从源代码构建 git clone https://github.com/bjarneo/cliamp.git && cd cliamp && go build -o cliamp 。快速启动 cliamp ~/Music # 播放目录 cliamp *.mp3 *.flac # 播放文件 cliamp https://example.com/stream # 播放 URL 按 Ctrl+K 查看所有按键绑定。文档
  5. 配置键绑定 CLI 标志 流媒体播放列表 YouTube、SoundCloud、Bandcamp 和 Bilibili 歌词 Spotify Navidrome 主题 音频质量 MPRIS 遥测

Original Summary

  1. ██████ ██ ██ █████ ███ ███ ██████ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ████ ████ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ███████ ██ ████ ██ ██████ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██████ ███████ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██ ██
  2. A retro terminal music player inspired by Winamp. Play local files, streams, podcasts, YouTube, SoundCloud, Bilibili, Spotify, Xiaoyuzhou (小宇宙), and Navidrome with a spectrum visualizer, parametric EQ, and playlist management. Built with Bubbletea, Lip Gloss, Beep, and go-librespot.
  3. cliamp_whips_tty_ass_compressed.mp4
  4. Radio Tune in to our radio channel: cliamp https://radio.cliamp.stream/lofi/stream.pls Add your own stations to ~/.config/cliamp/radios.toml. See docs/configuration.md. Want to host your own radio? Check out cliamp-server. Install curl -fsSL https://raw.githubusercontent.com/bjarneo/cliamp/HEAD/install.sh | sh Homebrew brew install bjarneo/cliamp/cliamp Arch Linux (AUR) yay -S cliamp Pre-built binaries Download from GitHub Releases. Build from source git clone https://github.com/bjarneo/cliamp.git && cd cliamp && go build -o cliamp . Quick Start cliamp ~/Music # play a directory cliamp *.mp3 *.flac # play files cliamp https://example.com/stream # play a URL Press Ctrl+K to see all keybindings. Docs
  5. Configuration Keybindings CLI Flags Streaming Playlists YouTube, SoundCloud, Bandcamp and Bilibili Lyrics Spotify Navidrome Themes Audio Quality MPRIS Telemetry

评论（默认中文）

Habgdnv 2026/03/24 09:14
我怀念着 mp3blaster。我花了很多年在我的终端上听它。有一次，我在 slackware 上只使用了 cli，没有图形桌面，而我的一位 TTY 专门用于它。

事实证明，这些时光已经一去不复返了——再也不会回来了。当我第一次尝试从本地磁盘播放 mp3 文件并启动出站连接时，我感到非常失望。为什么本地 CLI 播放器需要出站 TCP 连接才能播放本地磁盘上的本地文件？！？！答案就在源码中。这称为遥测。那时，当我使用 mp3blaster 时，我们通常称其为间谍软件，但从那时起，时代已经发生了变化。

I remember with nostalgia the mp3blaster. I spent years listening to it in my terminal. At one point I used only cli without graphical desktop on slackware and one of my TTYs was dedicated to it.

Turns out these times are forever gone - never to come back. The huge disappointment when I tried this on the first run to play a mp3 file from my local disk and it initiated outbound connection. Why a local CLI player needs outbound TCP connection to play a local file from my local disk?!?! The answer was in the source. It is called telemetry. Back then when I used mp3blaster we used to call this spyware, but the times had changed since then.

在 HN 中查看
samplatt 2026/03/24 09:36
时代没有变。它仍然是间谍软件，只是被标准化了。
The times haven't changed. It's still spyware, it's just been normalised.

tosti 2026/03/24 09:28
伊斯兰合作组织： https://github.com/bjarneo/cliamp/blob/main/telemetry/teleme...

应该很容易削弱，但构建说明有点模糊。克隆，然后呢？像“去构建”之类的东西或者我猜的东西。

虽然看起来很酷

OIC: https://github.com/bjarneo/cliamp/blob/main/telemetry/teleme...

Should be easy to nerf, but the build instructions are kinda vague. Clone, and then what? Something like "go build" or something I guess.

Looks cool though

gesis 2026/03/24 09:34
有一个配置变量和一个要禁用的 cli 标志。

这对我来说似乎很合理。

There's a config variable and a cli flag to disable.

That seems reasonable to me.

在 HN 中查看
Habgdnv 2026/03/24 09:33
我看到了，这不是间谍软件。它只是发送一个随机的 UUID。这只是个人的失望，因为它就像一个控制台播放器一样简单，但却连接到某个地方。但这只是我。我在其他时代长大。

另外，我刚刚编译了 mp3blaster，我正在再次听它。太酷了！

I saw it, it is NOT spyware. It just sends a random UUID. It is just a personal disappointment for the fact that it is something so simple as a console player and yet connects somewhere. But that's just me. I grew up in other times.

Also I just compiled mp3blaster and I am listening to it again. So cool!

daytonix 2026/03/24 09:33
刚刚安装了这个，到目前为止很喜欢它！谢谢你！
Just installed this, loving it so far! Thank you!

samschooler 2026/03/24 09:10
这个项目很酷，演示歌曲是标志性的，人工智能不太好，抱歉。
The project is cool, the demo song is iconically AI not great, sorry.
在 HN 中查看
Vaslo 2026/03/24 09:24
我一直在 Omarchy 中使用它，它真的很棒 - 易于使用，可以播放 YouTube 上的任何歌曲或播放列表，因此我将在不访问 YouTube 的情况下浏览这些编程集中播放列表。
I’ve been using this in Omarchy, it’s really great - easy to use and can do any songs or playlist on YouTube, so I’ll pipe through those programming concentration playlists without visiting YouTube.
